---
title: "Write this code on Mac's Terminal if you have R issues with spanish accents"
author: "Andrés Gutiérrez"
date: "2014-03-25"
categories:
  - "Estadística"
  - "R"
  - "Stats"
---

If you are writing in spanish inside R for MAC, maybe you will face an encoding issue when you type particular symbols as: ñ, á, é, í, ó, ú, etc. You can stop suffering by typing the following command on your terminal:

```
defaults write org. R-project. R force. LANG en_US. UTF-8
```
